title: Former Japanese nurse accused of mixing feces in intravenous serum to murder a hospitalized patient
summary: The suspect, who voluntarily resigned, allegedly extracted feces from a waste room and injected them into the patient's serum, whose condition abruptly worsened, and then conducted internet searches on the lethality of injecting feces.

title: Argentina defeats England in the 2026 World Cup final led by Messi
summary: With two assists from Lionel Messi and a goal from Lautaro Martínez, Argentina came back to defeat England and retain their world title in an exciting final.

title: Credit card payment failure affects numerous businesses across Japan
summary: A problem in Visa's processing system caused card transactions to be unable to complete at convenience stores and establishments, including the Mobile Suica service.

title: United States image falls below China's in a global survey of 36 countries
summary: According to a study, favorable opinion of the US among surveyed countries plummeted due to Trump's policies, while China improved its perception.

title: United States intensifies attacks against Iran and threatens to expand offensive
summary: US forces have attacked for five consecutive days, disabling an oil tanker that violated the blockade, while President Trump considers striking Kharg Island and nuclear facilities.

title: Tokyo Stock Exchange suffers sharp drop with Nikkei losing more than 1,900 points
summary: The Nikkei index closed with a loss of 1,915 points, affected by weakness in semiconductor stocks and concerns over an initial public offering of Chinese competition.

title: Daihatsu recalls more than 290,000 light trucks for safety defects
summary: Toyota's subsidiary called for inspection of three light truck models, including the Hijet Truck, to repair unspecified problems, affecting approximately 290,000 units.

title: Nissan presents fourth generation of the Elgrand minivan after 16-year wait
summary: The new model, priced at 6.89 million yen, arrives in the Japanese market with a renewed design and improvements in driving performance.

title: Osaka Metro chairman resigns over Expo electric bus scandal
summary: The investigation into the acquisition of the vehicles revealed that safety risks were not properly evaluated, leading to the suspension of their use and the resignation of the executive.

title: Japan agrees to introduce new income-linked social welfare system in 2029
summary: The government and opposition reached a basic agreement to implement a benefits system that will replace current subsidies, while debate continues on reducing the consumption tax on food.

title: Bill to penalize damage to national flag approved in Senate committee
summary: The initiative, which establishes penalties for those who destroy or damage the flag of Japan, was approved in the Internal Affairs Committee and is expected to be voted on in the plenary.

title: Hokuriku Shinkansen extension to pass through new station in Kyoto according to bipartisan agreement
summary: The LDP and the Innovation Party decided on the route passing through Kyoto, although the city is reluctant to assume the additional costs of the project.

title: Father arrested for death of his two children in Gunma citing pessimism about future
summary: The man was arrested on suspicion of murdering his eldest son and pleaded not guilty, while police investigate whether he also killed his second child in an apparent case of parricide.

title: Ukraine and EU sign drone cooperation agreement to increase production to 20 million
summary: President Zelensky announced the 'Drone Deal' with the European Union, which will allow Ukraine to increase its drone production capacity to 20 million units per year.

title: Approval of Prime Minister Takaichi's cabinet falls to 49% and faces criticism in debate
summary: The government's popularity reached its lowest level since taking office, in a context of questions about her leadership ability and evasion of answers in the plenary.

title: 11-month-old baby dies from heatstroke inside parked car in Kumamoto
summary: The child was found dead in the vehicle in the parking lot of his home and died in the hospital, apparently due to the high temperatures inside the car.

title: Yokohama defeats Tokai Sagami in Kanagawa high school baseball tournament
summary: The game, which drew long queues of spectators, ended with a mercy rule victory in the eighth inning for Yokohama, advancing in the summer tournament.

title: Japanese AI startup Noetra partners with Nvidia to develop next-generation systems
summary: Noetra, a domestic artificial intelligence company, will collaborate with US giant Nvidia to introduce its latest chips and accelerate the development of AI models.

title: Susumu Tonegawa, first Japanese to win Nobel Prize in Medicine, dies at 86
summary: The scientist, known for his discovery of how antibody diversity is generated, died leaving a legacy that revolutionized biology and immunology.

title: United States to issue one-dollar coin with Donald Trump's image for 250th anniversary
summary: The coin with the motto 'In God We Trust' joins other initiatives where Trump's image has been placed on airports, bridges, and passports, sparking criticism over the cult of his figure.
